back_translation: For this reason, I, Paul, the prisoner of Lord Jesus Christ for the sake of you Gentiles
If indeed you have heard about the mission of the grace of God that He has given to me for you
The mystery has been made known to me through revelation, just as I have already written briefly
When you read this, you will be able to understand my insight into the mystery of Lord Christ
In previous ages, this mystery was not made known to the sons of men, as it has now been revealed to the holy apostles of His and the prophets by the Spirit
The mystery is that the Gentiles are joint heirs, joint members in the same body, and joint partakers in the promise in Lord Jesus Christ through the gospel
I have become a servant of that gospel by the gift of the grace of God, which He has given to me according to the working of His power
He has given this grace to me, who am the lowliest among all the saints, so that I may proclaim the gospel of the unsearchable riches of Lord Christ to the Gentiles
And so that He may make all people see clearly what the mission of the mystery is — that mystery which has been hidden from the ages in God who created all things
So that now, through the church, the manifold wisdom of God may be made apparent to the rulers and the authorities in the heavenly realms
According to the eternal plan of His, which He accomplished in Lord Jesus Christ, our Lord
In Him, we have boldness and access to God with confidence, through faith in Him
Therefore, I ask you not to be discouraged because of my sufferings that I endure for your sake; for that suffering is your glory
For this reason, I therefore bow my knees down before the Father
From whom every family in heaven and on earth receives its name
May He grant to you, according to the riches of His glory, that you be strengthened with power, by His Spirit, in the inner man of yours
So that Lord Christ may dwell in your hearts through faith, and so that you may be rooted and established firmly in love
So that you may have power to grasp, together with all the saints, the breadth, length, height, and depth
And to know the love of Lord Christ that exceeds any knowledge to fathom, so that you may be filled with all the fullness of God
Now, may glory be given to Him who is able to do above all things, exceeding what we ask or think abundantly, according to the power that is working within us
May glory be to Him in the church and in Lord Jesus Christ, throughout every generation, forever and ever, amen
